inputs.text: Main thoda bukhar aur thakaan mehsoos kar raha hoon, sar dard bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Bukhar aur thakaan generic viral presentation hai

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Bukhar aur thakaan bronchitis ka bhi symptom ho sakta hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Abhi tak koi specific symptom nahi hai jo tuberculosis ki taraf ishara kare

inputs.text: Mujhe dry cough ho raha hai, bukhar abhi bhi hai lekin thakaan thodi kam ho gayi hai

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Dry cough bronchitis ka common symptom hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Bukhar abhi bhi hai lekin viral fever ka symptom kam ho raha hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Abhi tak koi specific symptom nahi hai jo tuberculosis ki taraf ishara kare

inputs.text: Mujhe raat ko pasina aata hai, wazan bhi kam ho raha hai aur cough abhi bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Raat ko pasina, wazan kam hona aur cough >2 weeks tuberculosis ki cardinal signs hai

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Cough bronchitis ka symptom hai lekin raat ko pasina aur wazan kam hona ismein nahi hota

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
hypotheses.rationale: Petechiae rash spots pneumonia ki taraf bhi ishara kar sakte hain

inputs.text: Mujhe severe weakness mehsoos ho rahi hai, balgam mein khoon bhi aaya hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Severe weakness, balgam mein khoon tuberculosis ki confirmation hai

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out, bronchitis mein aisa symptom nahi hota

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out, pneumonia mein bhi aisa symptom nahi hota
